name: Greek Almond Shortbread

ingredients.item: Half teaspoon of vanilla bean paste
Two and a half cups flour

method: Add the vanilla bean paste, flour, baking powder, unsalted butter, egg
yolk, and almonds into the bowl.
Mix all the ingredients and add them to a baking tray.
Bake the mixture for thirty minutes.
Dish out the bread and cut it into slices.
Dust the bread with icing sugar.
Your dish is ready to be served.
